summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine backend APIs and frontend Tech Analysis module. All backend endpoints working correctly, frontend module loads and displays MTF Alignment, Market Narrative, and pattern detection (Inverse H&S) as required.
passed_tests: TA Engine MTF endpoint /api/ta-engine/mtf/BTC returns analysis data with tf_map and mtf_context
TA Setup V2 endpoint /api/ta/setup/v2?symbol=BTC&timeframe=4H returns trade_setup and execution_plan
TA Setup V2 endpoint /api/ta/setup/v2?symbol=BTC&timeframe=1D returns valid analysis data
Execution plan correctly handles no_trade scenarios when confidence is not CLEAR
Coinbase adapter module exists and is properly structured with all required methods
Coinbase provider status endpoint returns valid status
Frontend Tech Analysis module loads successfully
Tech Analysis module shows Research and Hypotheses tabs
MTF Alignment section displays with NEUTRAL status and 0% confidence
Market Narrative section shows 'Inverse Head Shoulders suggests short-term neutral pressure'
Pattern detection displays 'Inverse H&S' pattern with NEUTRAL bias
Chart displays candlestick data with pattern overlay
Save Idea functionality works (button changes from 'Save Idea' to 'Saved')
All header action buttons (Refresh, Share, Screenshot, Save Idea) are present and clickable
Visual elements present: 78 SVG elements, 7 Canvas elements, 5 chart containers
